name: Apple Omelette
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core the apples, then slice them paper-thin. The thinness is important as they barely cook.
2. Add the rum or lemon juice and 6 teaspoons of sugar to a bowl, mix well.
3. Set aside until ready to use.
4. In another bowl, beat the eggs with 3 tablespoons of cold water and the remaining 6 teaspoons of sugar.
5. Add the apple mixture to the egg mixture.
6. Cook the omelette according to your preferred method, then fold and serve.
7. To flame the omelette, sprinkle 2 tablespoons of sugar on top. Pour 3-4 tablespoons of hot rum over it.
8. Set the rum afire and keep pouring it over the flaming omelette until the fire dies out.
